hero.subtitle: Ancestral mezcal with character, origin, and a presence built to endure.

about.label: About Us
about.title: A vision that honors the origin
about.body: CASA ORAZAL is born from a vision that honors origin, time, and the authentic expression of ancestral mezcal. Each bottle seeks to convey a story of character, tradition, and care for the process.
about.body2: Our relationship with agave goes beyond production. It is a commitment to the land, to the master distillers, and to a way of making that accepts no shortcuts.
about.vision: To bring the essence of ancestral Mexican mezcal to connoisseurs around the world, without ever losing the authenticity of its origin.

origin.label: Origin
origin.title: From agave to glass
origin.subtitle: A process that is never in a hurry
origin.body: At CASA ORAZAL every stage of the process is an act of respect. From the selection of the mature agave to distillation in copper pot stills, every decision is guided by ancestral knowledge passed down through generations.

agave.title: Agave Selection
agave.desc: Only plants at their optimal maturity peak, with years of natural growth.

cooking.title: Earth Oven Roasting
cooking.desc: Pit-roasted with wood fire, the method that gives depth and character.

fermentation.title: Natural Fermentation
fermentation.desc: In wooden vats with wild yeasts from the surroundings, without chemical intervention.

distillation.title: Artisanal Distillation
distillation.desc: Copper pot still, temperature controlled by hand, with the eye of a master distiller.

products.label: Our Mezcals
products.title: Two expressions, one character
products.subtitle: Two expressions from the same origin. Each mezcal is the result of hands, earth, time, and fire — never repeated, always unique.

arroqueno.name: Arroqueño
arroqueno.desc: Vegetal character, depth, and a marked personality. Earth oven roasting defines its unique and unmistakable profile.
arroqueno.notes: Earthy, intensely smoky, with hints of dark chocolate and wild herbs.
arroqueno.differentiator: The truest expression of the ancestral pit-roasting process

papalometl.name: Papalometl
papalometl.desc: Intensity, elegance, and sophistication in their purest form. Papalometl is a rarity that speaks of time, patience, and mastery.
papalometl.notes: Complex, mineral, with layers of ripe fruit, spices, and an eternal finish.
papalometl.differentiator: Wild agave of slow maturation, the premium expression of our house

ancestral_process.label: Process
ancestral_process.title: The ancestral process
ancestral_process.subtitle: Handcrafted, made with time
ancestral_process.body: Mezcal production at CASA ORAZAL follows methods that predate the industrial world. No shortcuts, no rush. Only the knowledge of master distillers, respect for the agave, and the discipline of an inherited craft.

services.label: Services
services.title: Experiences to remember
services.subtitle: We design unique moments around ancestral mezcal.

corporate_tastings.title: Corporate Tastings
corporate_tastings.desc: Exclusive tasting experiences designed for corporate teams. A space to connect, learn, and celebrate.

private_tastings.title: Private Tastings
private_tastings.desc: Intimate sessions tailored for select groups, connoisseurs, or special celebrations.

private_events.title: Private Events
private_events.desc: CASA ORAZAL presence at your events. Elegance, product, and brand narrative in every glass.

brand_experiences.title: Brand Experiences
brand_experiences.desc: Activations that unite the sensory universe of mezcal with your brand. Unique and memorable collaborations.

activations.title: Activations
activations.desc: Presence at fairs, galleries, showrooms, and premium spaces. Your audience, our story.

distribution.title: Distribution & Alliances
distribution.desc: We seek commercial partners committed to quality. Let's talk about bringing CASA ORAZAL to your market.

blog.label: Editorial Blog
blog.title: From origin to palate
blog.subtitle: Stories about mezcal, its process, and its culture.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: We are ready to discuss the brand, our labels, experiences, and collaboration opportunities.

register.label: Community
register.title: Join the community
register.subtitle: Register to discover public tastings, relevant news, and new points of sale from CASA ORAZAL. Curated communication, without excess.
register.name: Full name
register.success: Welcome to the CASA ORAZAL community. You will receive only relevant information.
register.privacy: Your information is private. No spam.

store.label: Official Store
store.title: Our Collection
store.subtitle: Take home the result of 13 years of waiting under the solar fire.
store.shipping_note: * Free shipping across Mexico on orders over $2,999 MXN
